title: Progressive Raids
description: Raid difficulty increases as more are completed.
body:
This mod overhauls how bad omen amplifiers are applied.

A player's Bad Omen amplifier will always be equal to the difficulty of the most difficult raid previously won in a world, plus one.

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/Z8Z714G8U7)
